title: The end of the road for Union Stars
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Union Stars CC, the winner of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Union Stars CC, the winner of the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier League competition, was outplayed last weekend when it was determined who will represent the Western Cape in the Cricket South Africa Club championship.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Union Stars CC, the winner of the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier League competition, was outplayed last weekend when it was determined who will represent the Western Cape in the Cricket South Africa Club championship."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The matches, against the Western Province (Durbanville CC) and Boland winners (Stellenbosch University), were played at the University of the Western Cape.","html":"The matches, against the Western Province (Durbanville CC) and Boland winners (Stellenbosch University), were played at the University of the Western Cape."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Union Stars lost against Maties by 90 runs and lost by seven wickets against the top team, Durbanville."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The summarised score cards are:","html":"The summarised score cards are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"nMaties beat Union Stars by 90 runs:","html":"nMaties beat Union Stars by 90 runs:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Maties 189 all out - 45.6 overs (Kent Goedeke 58, David Christie 36, Jason Muirhead 27, Regan Rhode 3/33, Lee Henry Meyer 2/31, Grant Esau 2/56, Corné Kennedy 2/15).","html":"Maties 189 all out - 45.6 overs (Kent Goedeke 58, David Christie 36, Jason Muirhead 27, Regan Rhode 3/33, Lee Henry Meyer 2/31, Grant Esau 2/56, Corné Kennedy 2/15)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars 99 all out - 36.3 overs (Ross Boast 3/22, Matenzi Denega 2/18, Ryan Jairaj 2/24).","html":"Union Stars 99 all out - 36.3 overs (Ross Boast 3/22, Matenzi Denega 2/18, Ryan Jairaj 2/24)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"nDurbanville beat Union Stars by 7 wickets:","html":"nDurbanville beat Union Stars by 7 wickets:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars 149/9 - 50 overs (Breyton Plaatjies 61, Joviano Tock 31, Leon Le Roux 4/26, Darian Naidoo 3/26).","html":"Union Stars 149/9 - 50 overs (Breyton Plaatjies 61, Joviano Tock 31, Leon Le Roux 4/26, Darian Naidoo 3/26)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Durbanville150/3 (31.5 overs) (Fritz De Beer 55, Jean Strydom 41, Laurens Smit 36*, Regan Rhode 2/39).","html":"Durbanville150/3 (31.5 overs) (Fritz De Beer 55, Jean Strydom 41, Laurens Smit 36*, Regan Rhode 2/39)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
